governanceLocalNoActionsPublishedBenefit: Publishing gives you: a link to open it on other devices, a short code to invite people, editor management, and a forum for the branch.

governanceModalIntro: The branch link opens or adds the branch on another device. To invite someone to edit, enter their username in the section below.
governanceModalIntroOwner: Share the branch code (above) so others can open the same branch in Trees. To grant editing, enter the collaborator’s username below.
governanceModalIntroLocalPublishedOwner: Share the branch code above so others can open the same branch in Trees. To invite editors, open the branch from the public link on a device where you published.

maintainerBlocklistAddRefused: This tree cannot be added: it is on the maintainer blocklist for this build.
maintainerBlocklistLoadRefused: This public tree is on the maintainer blocklist for this app build: it cannot be opened from a link or share code here. Automatic moderation (reports / legal dispute) does not block opening, only this curated list does. To appeal, use the contact or policy channel described for your distribution (e.g. README / email).

treePresMobileCompactHint: Public summary & support link, tap to edit
treeReportPolicyBody:
Your report is stored safely (reason and sender, protected by proof-of-work so bots cannot inflate volume). It does not delete lessons or remove the branch from the internet.

Community reports are weighted (phishing/copyright weigh more; new accounts weigh less) and capped at 3 per week per person. If enough different people report the same branch in 14 days, it stops appearing in the in-app Discover list. Popular trees need a higher score (scaled by votes and usage). The affected publisher always sees score, threshold, and how to respond in Trees → row ⋯ (EU Digital Services Act, Art. 17).

Copyright and other illegal content use a separate legal-notice flow (DSA Art. 16): the owner has ~48 hours to respond; two independent legal notices can hide the listing immediately.

Normal reports do not email the distributor. For the operator, use only the options below.
treeReportSheetHint: Pick a reason. Sends are limited to prevent abuse.
